_comment: emit-trp-failure writes a single side-effect JSON to $OUT_PATH. The fixture is fully synthesized (no client source, no timestamps, no absolute paths in log/bundle content). Both Python `json.dumps(indent=2)` and Node `JSON.stringify(null, 2)` produce byte-identical output for this payload shape. No sanitization needed; parity test compares byte-for-byte.
sanitize_impl: none — byte-for-byte string equality between $OUT_PATH bytes and expected-side.json
shape_reason: primary output is a filesystem-side-effect JSON file at $OUT_PATH consumed by the SRP-J / TRP-O revise loop; stdout carries a human log line but the driver never parses it
